mapper.insert: MERGE INTO users AS target USING ( SELECT #{provider} AS provider, #{providerId} AS provider_id, #{providerEmail} AS provider_email, #{nickname} AS nickname, #{profileImage} AS profile_image ) AS src ON target.provider = src.provider AND target.provider_id = src.provider_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.provider_email = src.provider_email, target.nickname = src.nickname, target.profile_image = src.profile_image, target.updated_at = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (provider, provider_id, provider_email, nickname, profile_image) VALUES (src.provider, src.provider_id, src.provider_email, src.nickname, src.profile_image);
